metadata.methodology: City-level search across Casper and Cheyenne with homepage/contact extraction plus selective source-code contact recovery where direct contact blocks were sparse

candidates.notes: Casper promotional-products and awards company with explicit engraving department, laser capability, direct phone, email, and strong commercial fit.
Casper-area custom shop offering laser engraving, embroidery, banners, and branded products with strong testimonial evidence and a recovered public contact trail.

Cheyenne laser engraving and personalized-gift business with a clearly stated local pickup/viewing location at One Hour Cleaners. Contact block is thinner than the top-tier records, so quality stays moderate.
Relevant Casper engraver for custom cut stamps, plaques, name plates, and door indicators, but the surfaced pass did not recover a clean direct contact block.
Promotional-gifts and engraving-oriented business relevant to Wyoming, but the public site exposed very little trustworthy city/contact detail in this pass.
Long-running full-service Wyoming sign company serving the whole state since 1956. Strong commercial signage fit with direct email and phone.
Casper graphics and custom-production shop offering signs, banners, engraving, wraps, tumblers, and promotional materials. Clear address signal, but direct contact details surfaced weakly.
